title: Drugs thesis (Cameron / YG)

Drugs thesis (Cameron / YG)

Stub. The Dec 2021 crypto and drugs thesis Yahir wrote with Cameron — the corvallis crypto club-era synthesis where decriminalization, harm-reduction, and crypto-rails framed a single market thesis. Surfaces in 2021 11 05 ceos of the future.
